sourcesContent:
import {React, useEffect, useState} from 'react' import { Link, useParams } from 'react-router-dom' import axios from 'axios' export default function Category() { const {id} = useParams() const [category, setCategory] = useState([]) useEffect(() => { getIdData(id) } , [id]) const getIdData = async(id) => { const res = await axios.get(`http://localhost:1700/backend/category/${id}`) setCategory(res.data) console.log(category) } return (
{category.category_name} {category.length} items
Projector From ₹6990 Mobile Cables From ₹499 Apple iPhone 17 From ₹82,900 Monitors From ₹6599 Top Mirrorless Camera Shop Now! Fastrack Smartwatch From ₹1,399 Wireless Headphones Grab Now Printers From ₹2336 Wireless Headphones Grab Now Printers From ₹2336
) }
